# Generated by ollama (mistral)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for VPC network with subnets for our three-tier application. Use auto-create subnets mode for simplicity so GCP creates subnet ranges automatically. This speeds up deployment without manual IP planning.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
- name: vpc-network
  type: google::vpc_network
  properties:
    project: ${params.project}
    name: ${params.vpcNetworkName}
    autoCreateSubnetDefaultNetwork: true

- name: vpc-subnets
  type: google::compute_subnetwork
  properties:
    project: ${params.project}
    region: ${params.region}
    network: $(ref.vpc-network)
    namePrefix: ${params.subnetNamePrefix}
    ipCidrRange: $(var.autoCreatedSubnetSize)
    numberOfAddresses: 200

variables:
  project: 'your-project-id'
  region: 'us-central1'
  vpcNetworkName: 'my-vpc-network'
  subnetNamePrefix: 'my-subnet'
  autoCreatedSubnetSize: '192.88.0.0/24'
